groups.title: Qwen 3.5
groups.summary: Three compact Qwen 3.5 sizes for 6 GB RAM devices, from the lightest everyday chat option to a stronger small local model.

models.title: Qwen 3.5 (0.8B)
models.summary: The lightest Qwen 3.5 option. Best when you care most about install size, launch speed, and basic on-device chat.

models.title: Qwen 3.5 (2B)
models.summary: A balanced middle tier for users who want a better everyday local model without moving into the heavier small-model range.

models.title: Qwen 3.5 (4B)
models.summary: The strongest Qwen 3.5 pick in this 6 GB-oriented set. Best when you want better quality and can accept a larger install.

groups.title: Gemma 4
groups.summary: A compact Gemma 4 E2B pick for users who want the Gemma family on 6 GB-class devices without jumping to much larger models.

models.title: Gemma 4 (E2B)
models.summary: A small instruction-tuned Gemma 4 option that keeps the family available on tighter memory budgets.

groups.title: LFM 2.5
groups.summary: Compact Liquid AI picks that split cleanly across general chat, more deliberate thinking, and lightweight vision use cases.

models.title: LFM 2.5 (1.2B Instruct)
models.summary: A lightweight general chat model focused on fast on-device instruction following.

models.title: LFM 2.5 (1.2B Thinking)
models.summary: A small reasoning-oriented variant for users who want more deliberate answers without leaving the lightweight tier.

models.title: LFM 2.5 VL (1.6B)
models.summary: A compact vision-language model for image-aware prompts while staying in the lightweight local range.
